title: betula alba var. rhombifolia
intro: Betula alba var. rhombifolia, also known as white birch, is a variety of the white birch tree that is native to China and is characterized by its rhombic leaf shape. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Betula alba var. rhombifolia include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
